verbatim_text: So these interrupt tools tend to be very hard to scale, and they're also not accessible to ordinary users that are just talking to chat LGBT on some chat interface. So it's really what we really want is to get explanations in band through the procedure, through a procedure like directly asking the model, but with the faithfulness of these interpretability tools. Okay, so in order to do that, we're going to enforce consistency between the outcomes of interrupt tools and the results of directly asking the model. So we're going to use these interrupt tools as supervision for the language model itself.
